_comment: MoA routing config. Swap model names here without changing router.py.
_vram_reality: 3080 Ti = 12 GB VRAM. Resident brain = gemma3:4b (~3 GB, GPU-resident). Coder qwen3:8b (~5 GB) and vision qwen2.5vl:3b (~2.5 GB) load ON-DEMAND per task via MoA; they do NOT sit resident. 4B+8B=8 GB can coexist; 4B+3B=6.5 GB too. All three at once (13.5 GB) exceeds 12 GB, but MoA invokes specialists per-call so they're never all resident simultaneously. This is the only layout that fits 12 GB while keeping full MoA.
_lineup: B: resident uncensored Gemma 4B brain + on-demand Qwen3 8B coder + Qwen2.5-VL 3B vision.
